feedback.text: In the Digital Fairness Act, please also take into account the destruction of digital content such as video games. I was affected when Ubisoft deactivated my purchased game The Crew is now inoperable. I was de facto deprived of my digital property, without compensation or alternative. Such practices are unfair to consumers and undermine trust in digital offers. The Digital Fairness Act should guarantee clear safeguards and rights of use here.
